article.title: Atlassian P50 v/s Uber L5a
article.content:
Hi,

Can somebody compare the two based on multiple factors and help me choose?

Both have comparable TC - 1 Cr+ .

post.content: problems I need in my life

Years of exp
current company
full offers,
Your location
looking for WLB or more work culture, things like this might help more in asking for comparison .
In my personal openion you should prefer Uber, bcz They offers more Base component.

Both are considered toxic as hell.
I would prefer remote on this case.
i am surprised that Atlassian P50 matches offers of Uber L5a nowadays. 
I got an offer of Zone B from Atlassian , P50. I did not try to interview at Uber though, but I would be really surprised if Uber in my area pays less than 400K TC (My offer from Atlassian is less than that).
I would go for Atlassian because they are remote.
